lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in mint condition.

2020 sedan in mint condition. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in original condition with no signs of wear on the upholstery or floor mats. All mechanical components and electronic features are fully functional and operate as new.

This vehicle is in absolute mint, showroom condition, having been preserved with meticulous care. The exterior paint is entirely flawless, retaining a deep, mirror-like shine, while the interior is pristine and still carries a new-car feel. Mechanically, it is perfect, with every system functioning exactly as it did the day it left the factory. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that has been kept in peak aesthetic and mechanical form.

We are honored to present this superlative vehicle, currently maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This asset represents a rare acquisition opportunity for the discerning buyer, boasting an impeccable exterior finish and an interior environment that remains indistinguishable from new. Rigorously inspected and meticulously preserved, the mechanical integrity of this unit is matched only by its flawless aesthetic presentation. This is a definitive example of automotive excellence, curated for those who prioritize uncompromising quality and prestige.

Hey there! If you’ve been looking for your dream ride, you’ve definitely found it! This beauty is in absolutely pristine condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve truly pampered this car, and it’s been kept in flawless shape inside and out. It’s a total joy to drive and I’m only letting it go to see it move on to a great new home. Come take a look, I promise you won't be disappointed!

This 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S represents the zenith of the 996.2 generation, maintained in flawless mechanical and aesthetic order. The 3.6L flat-six engine features Variocam Plus timing and has been fastidiously serviced, including a proactive IMS bearing retrofit and a verified rear main seal. Power is delivered through a Getrag G96/31 six-speed manual transaxle to a rear-biased viscous-coupling AWD system, ensuring optimal lateral grip and turn-in precision. The wide-body chassis retains its factory-spec torsional rigidity, supported by a pristine suspension geometry with original Bilstein dampers. Braking is handled by four-piston monobloc calipers over cross-drilled rotors, showing zero heat checking. With a leak-free undercarriage and a factory-spec exhaust note, this example is a turn-key acquisition for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. One owner. Zero accidents. Garage stored. Clean title. Maintenance records available. Inspection invited.

This is, quite simply, a time capsule. Finished in its original factory deep-gloss paint, the exterior is absolutely flawless—no rock chips, no swirl marks, and certainly no dings. It has been kept in a climate-controlled environment and recently treated with a multi-stage ceramic coating that makes the bodywork look wet to the touch. Every piece of chrome and trim retains its showroom luster, and the glass is crystal clear without a single pit. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather seats still possess that distinct 'new car' aroma and show zero bolster wear or creasing. The dashboard is perfect, with no UV fading or cracking, and every single switch, dial, and electronic feature operates with tactile precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It comes with a binder of meticulous service records from day one, documenting a life of preventative maintenance. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the undercarriage is as dry as the day it left the assembly line. It drives exactly as the engineers intended: tight, responsive, and whisper-quiet. This sale includes all original keys, the factory tool kit, and the original window sticker. For the discerning collector who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is the one.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle is maintained in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and adhering to the most rigorous standards of preservation. Every component, from the immaculate interior appointments to the precision-engineered powertrain, functions with the integrity of a factory-new unit. For the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept tucked away in a climate-controlled garage and pampered more than I’d like to admit! It honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor—not a single scratch, dent, or speck of dust to be found. I’m truly sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely fall in love the second they hit the road. It's a total dream car, ready for a new home!

Offering a museum-quality 2004 BMW M3 (E46) Coupe, a true mechanical masterpiece for the purist. This specimen features the S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing to achieve a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered via a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable differential lock. The chassis is pristine, with documented preventative subframe reinforcement and a complete cooling system refresh. Every bushing, link, and damper remains within factory tolerances, ensuring the telepathic handling characteristics these cars are known for. Finished in flawless Carbon Black with an untouched Nappa leather interior, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a mechanically synchronized, turn-key icon of the analog era.
Used car. Mint condition. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title.
